description: Style NoteThese tunics are this season's winners because of the use of simple styling techniques that spruce up the entire look without going overboard. Summery and cool, these tops can be worn with shorts or trousers for a look that will definitely make heads turn.   Product DetailsMulti coloured top, has a V neckline, softly folding collar, tie detail in front at the neckline, cap sleeves, gathers from below the bust and elasticated hemlineMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash coldDo not bleachLine dry Use cold ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model height (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
